title: AutoSmelting
description:
Adds the auto-smelting of ores to your game.
When mining ores, they drop a smelted version of them, as well as experience.
The fortune enchantment on a pickaxe affects the amount of loot dropped
body:
Are you tired of waiting every time the mined ore is smelted in the furnace? Or do you want to speed up the player development process at your event? Then you need this plugin!

The plugin will add the auto-melt function to your server.
If a player takes the right pickaxe and mines one of the ores or an ancient debris, a smelted version will drop.
When mining ores, an additional 1 unit of experience drops, and when mining ancient debris, 5 units of experience drops.
Be careful, because if you try to mine ore with a pickaxe that is not suitable for this, nothing will drop.
Also, if you enchant a pickaxe for luck, then depending on your luck level, more loot will drop.
You can use this plugin to organize events on the server, such as battle royale or UHC battle
